summary: Manifest now pins the Next 16/React 18 stack with pixi.js, better-sqlite3, zod, and a db check script; puzzle catalog + schema helpers capture palette/camera/motion cues per frontend-skill for the three progressive levels; POST /api/events/batch now validates telemetry batches, persists attempts/events/movements/progress, and scripts/check_db seeds/verifies SQLite. Tests not run yet—install deps then `npm run check:db` to verify migrations.

Skill applied: frontend-skill — delivered a full landing/map/workspace/analytics flow with polished theming, PIXI SceneCanvas animation, drag-and-drop BlockWorkspace (Show Code + warnings), ControlsPanel with speed/talk toggles, FailureModal, analytics dashboard + replay, and a deterministic engine/replay stack that emits timeline/events for telemetry; no automated tests run (next install pixi.js dependency and hook real telemetry APIs).
